statusDescriptions.completed: Mark purchase as fully paid and completed

warnings.cancelPurchase: Cancelling this purchase will revert all ledger entries and may affect farmer pending dues.
warnings.amountDueNote: This purchase has an amount due of {{amount}}. Marking as completed will consider it fully paid.

info.editNote: Full update mode - You can edit all fields including products, deductions, and amount paid. This will recalculate all totals. Only available for DRAFT status purchases.
